34.reason: Error: j should start from i+1, not i, to avoid comparing a segment with itself. Also, the logic should allow merging in both directions (i.e., a[i] can be extended by a[j] where a[j] starts at a[i]'s end, but also a[j] could be extended by a[i] if a[i] starts at a[j]'s end). The current loop only checks one direction.
